summary: Lane 10: Fixed tool cache atomicity + dead code in packages/opencode/src/tool/cache.ts — 3 issues fixed: (1) direct map mutations via Ref.get()+mutate replaced with atomic Ref.modify for hits/expired checks; (2) estimatedBytes now recalculated atomically inside Ref.update via combined CacheState struct; (3) getOrCompute marked @deprecated as dead API surface. Typecheck + tests pass.
